headline: Capital One Announces Stress Test Results
summary: MCLEAN, Va., June 24, 2026--Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE: COF) posted a summary of its company-run stress test results on its website (www.capitalone.com). This summary shows the results of Capital One’s modeling of the severely adverse scenario published by the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (the "Federal Reserve"). From the home page, select "About" choose "Investors" to access the Investor Center, select "Financials," and then choose "Stress Test Results" to view
